title: Specialized Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Specialized Architectures inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs)
steps.summary: A type of neural network designed for sequential data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Temporal Network Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Temporal Graph
steps.summary: Temporal Graph belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Temporal Network Models and Graph. It opens into Temporal Graph Embeddings and Temporal Graph Convolution.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Neuromorphic AI
steps.summary: Neuromorphic AI belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into Neuromorphic Chips for AI and AI on Neuromorphic Hardware.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Temporal Transformers
steps.summary: Temporal Transformers belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Transformers and Temporal Network Models. It opens into Temporal Fusion Transformers and PatchTST Temporal Transformers.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Temporal Graph Networks
steps.summary: Temporal Graph Networks belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Temporal Network Models and Graph. It opens into Temporal Graph Embeddings and Temporal Graph Convolution.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Spiking Neural Networks
steps.summary: Spiking Neural Networks belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Neural Network and Neural Networks. It opens into Spiking Graph Neural Networks and Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Temporal Difference Learning
steps.summary: Temporal Difference Learning belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Temporal Network Models and Q-Learning. It opens into Temporal Difference (TD) Learning and Temporal-Difference Learning (TD).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs)
steps.summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Specialized Architectures. It sits inside Neural Networks / Specialized Architectures. Start after Spiking Neural Networks and Neural Network. It opens into Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) Variants.
